changelog: Prevents concurrent library scans. Scan Now buttons disable while a scan is running and re-enable when it completes.
description: Automatically manages a configurable tag for movies and series based on TMDb physical release data.
name: Physical Release Guard
overview: Scans your movie and series libraries and adds or removes a configurable tag based on whether a physical release exists according to TMDb data. Movies use TMDb physical release dates; series use TMDb DVD/physical episode-group evidence.
